description: Observed during batch-1 research: Colorado SB 24-205 was repealed and reenacted by SB 26-189 (signed 2026-05-14) before its substantive duties ever became applicable — recorded here as the corpus's first real status-change entry. Repeal-timing nuance (operative on signing vs 2026-08-12) is an open Pass 2 verification item.

Observed during batch-1 research: the 2026 digital-omnibus amendment (Council final approval 2026-06-29, OJ publication pending) defers Annex III high-risk obligations to 2027-12-02 and Annex I-embedded to 2028-08-02, while Art 50(1) transparency keeps its 2026-08-02 date. Instrument lifecycle status unchanged (in_force_partially_applicable); dates drift recorded in key_dates. New CELEX to be captured at OJ publication (§19.5 re-scoring trigger).
